title: Platform Engineering for AI
shortSummary: Learn the deployment rails that let teams ship prompts, models, datasets, and services safely.
whyItMatters: Frontier AI products need more than prompt fluency. They need release discipline, rollback paths, registries, CI, and operational tooling. This is where platform engineering turns clever systems into dependable ones.
coreConcepts: Release pipelines for prompts, models, and retrieval changes
Environment promotion from local to staging to production
Internal developer platforms and golden paths for AI teams
